courses.name: DCA / ADCA
courses.shortDescription: Fundamental to advanced computer applications. Office automation, Internet, and basics of IT.
courses.fullDescription: Diploma in Computer Applications (DCA) and Advanced Diploma in Computer Applications (ADCA) are comprehensive programs designed to equip students with essential and advanced computer skills. From understanding basic computer operations to mastering office productivity suites, database management, and basic software concepts, this course is the perfect starting point for anybody looking to launch a career in IT or office administration.
courses.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance throughout the 6-month period, complete all monthly assignments, and actively participate in the 1-month internship program to qualify for a 100% refund of your tuition fees.
courses.certificateDetails: Professional Certification in Advanced Computer Applications from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan (registered under Govt. of India). Valid for both public and private sector employment.
learnItems: Computer Fundamentals & OS (Windows)
Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access)
Internet, Email, and Online Productivity Tools
Basics of Web Technologies & Web Browsing
Introduction to Database Systems & SQL
Basic Graphic Designing concepts (PageMaker, Photoshop)
courses.eligible: 10th standard or equivalent from any recognized board. Open to students, professionals, and homemakers.

courses.name: Web Development
courses.shortDescription: Master HTML, CSS, JS, and frameworks to build high-performance modern websites.
courses.fullDescription: The Web Development program is an intensive, job-oriented coding bootcamp designed to transform beginners into skilled web developers. This course covers everything from modern semantic markup and advanced styling structures to dynamic client-side programming and deployment workflows. You will learn to build responsive, accessible, and performant web interfaces that align with current industry standards.
courses.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance, complete and submit all front-end responsive projects, and successfully deploy your capstone web project during the 1-month internship to get your full tuition fees refunded.
courses.internshipIncluded: 1-Month Hands-on Web Development Internship on Live Agency Projects
courses.certificateDetails: Web Developer Internship & Course Completion Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan. Includes a verified project portfolio link on GitHub.
learnItems: Semantic HTML5 & Modern CSS3 layouts (Flexbox, Grid)
Responsive Web Design & Mobile-First styling
JavaScript (ES6+) Core & DOM Manipulation
Introduction to Modern Frameworks (React / Vue basics)
Version Control with Git & Collaboration via GitHub
Website Deployment, Hosting (Netlify, Vercel), and Performance Optimization
courses.eligible: 12th standard or equivalent. Basic computer literacy and logical thinking are recommended.

courses.name: Digital Marketing
courses.shortDescription: Learn SEO, Social Media Marketing, and Google Ads to dominate the digital landscape.
courses.fullDescription: In today's digital era, businesses must stand out online. The Digital Marketing course covers all aspects of modern search engine optimization, content creation, social media growth hacking, and paid advertisement campaign management. You will work on real marketing budgets, write ad copies, analyze page metrics, and design result-driven digital marketing campaigns.
courses.refundDetails: Achieve a minimum of 90% attendance, create a complete digital marketing strategy for a real brand, and complete the 1-month marketing internship to be eligible for a 100% tuition refund.
courses.internshipIncluded: 1-Month Practical Social Media & Search Engine Marketing Internship
courses.certificateDetails: Certified Digital Marketing Professional credentials from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan, plus preparation guides for Google and Meta certifications.
learnItems: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) - On-Page, Off-Page, and Technical SEO
Social Media Marketing (SMM) on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube
Search Engine Marketing (SEM) - Setting up and optimizing Google Search Ads
Email Marketing, Lead Generation strategies, and Funnel Building
Web Analytics (Google Analytics 4) and ROI Tracking
Graphic design basics for social media creatives using Canva
courses.eligible: Graduates, college students, small business owners, or anyone looking to build a career in sales, marketing, and advertising.

courses.name: GST & Return Filing
courses.shortDescription: Practical training on Goods and Services Tax, registration, and monthly returns filing.
courses.fullDescription: GST & Return Filing course is tailored for aspiring tax professionals and accountants. This program provides end-to-end practical training on the Goods and Services Tax framework in India. You will learn to register new entities, classify goods and services, compute taxes, reconcile Input Tax Credit, and file various GST returns (like GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B) on the official government GST Portal.
courses.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance, successfully file simulated GST returns without errors, and complete the 1-month practical internship to get your entire fee refunded.
courses.certificateDetails: GST Practitioner & Filing Certificate issued by Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan. Proof of hands-on GST portal competency.
learnItems: Introduction to Direct vs Indirect Taxes and the GST Act
GST Registration Process for Sole Proprietorships and Partnerships
Understanding HSN/SAC Codes, GST Rates, and Tax Invoices
Input Tax Credit (ITC) Rules, Apportionment, and Reconciliation
E-filing of GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-4, and annual returns
E-Way Bills generation and GST audits basics
courses.eligible: Commerce graduates, post-graduates (B.Com/M.Com/BBA/MBA), accounting staff, and tax practitioners.

courses.name: Income Tax Return Filing
courses.shortDescription: Master personal and corporate ITR filing. Understand tax savings and auditing.
courses.fullDescription: Income Tax Return (ITR) Filing is one of the most in-demand financial services. This training focuses on the income tax laws, deductions under Chapter VI-A, TDS/TCS provisions, and e-filing individual and business returns. You will get hands-on experience using the latest Income Tax e-filing software and utility tools to file Genuinely Audited and Non-Audited returns.
courses.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance, accurately compute tax liabilities for multiple mock cases, and complete the 1-month tax consulting internship for a 100% refund.
courses.internshipIncluded: 1-Month Tax Planning & Return Filing Internship under Senior Consultants
courses.certificateDetails: Income Tax Professional Certification from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan, highlighting specialization in personal and corporate tax filing.
learnItems: Basic concepts of Income Tax, Assessment Years, and Residential Status
Five Heads of Income: Salary, House Property, Business/Profession, Capital Gains, and Other Sources
Tax Deductions (80C, 80D, etc.) and Tax Planning strategies
Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) and Tax Collected at Source (TCS) rules
Step-by-step e-filing of ITR-1, ITR-2, ITR-3, and ITR-4 forms
Responding to Income Tax notices and rectification requests
courses.eligible: Commerce students, working accountants, finance professionals, and lawyers wanting to offer tax filing services.

courses.name: Tally & Advanced Excel
courses.shortDescription: Professional accounting with TallyPrime and advanced data analysis using MS Excel.
courses.fullDescription: This dynamic combination of TallyPrime and Microsoft Excel is designed to fulfill the core requirements of any modern accounting and data management role. You will learn to handle complete corporate book-keeping, inventory tracking, payroll processing, and financial reporting in Tally, while mastering advanced data analysis formulas, pivot tables, and dashboard creation in MS Excel.
courses.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance, pass all accounting case studies, and complete the 1-month corporate accounting internship to get a 100% tuition fee refund.
courses.certificateDetails: Joint Certificate in Computerized Accounting (TallyPrime) & Advanced Data Management (Excel) from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Double-entry bookkeeping, ledger creation, and voucher entry in TallyPrime
Inventory Management, Godown management, and Stock Journalization
GST activation, invoice generation, and tax filing reports in Tally
Advanced Excel formulas (VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, INDEX-MATCH)
Pivot Tables, Pivot Charts, and building interactive business dashboards
Data Cleaning, Text formulas, Logical functions, and Basic Macros
courses.eligible: 12th pass students, B.Com/M.Com graduates, administrative managers, and anyone looking to enhance their corporate employability.

internships.name: Computer Fundamentals Internship
internships.shortDescription: Real-world practice on office automation tools, documentation, and digital collaboration.
internships.fullDescription: The Computer Fundamentals Internship is designed for students seeking office administrative experience. This 1-month program focuses on practical, day-to-day office operations, document design, data organization, and professional communication workflows in a corporate setting.
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance and successfully complete all weekly data entry and office management tasks to receive a 100% refund of the ₹1,000 registration fee.
internships.certificateDetails: Office Administration Internship Experience Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Professional letter writing and formatting standards
Spreadsheet automation for basic bookkeeping and tracking
Digital filing systems, data entry protocols, and security
Cloud collaboration tools (Google Docs, Sheets, Drive)
Professional email etiquette and correspondence
internships.eligible: Students, graduates, or anyone wishing to gain real office work experience and computer fluency.
practicalTasks: Drafting official corporate letters, circulars, and agendas
Creating automated monthly expense trackers in MS Excel
Designing professional client feedback forms and processing responses
Preparing presentation slides for weekly team meetings
careerBenefits: Standard office skill validation and confidence
Official Internship Certificate and recommendation letter eligibility
Preparedness for Office Administrator and Executive Assistant positions

internships.name: Digital Marketing Internship
internships.shortDescription: Get hands-on experience working on live social media marketing and SEO campaigns.
internships.fullDescription: Gain practical exposure in digital marketing. During this 1-month internship, you will help design content calendars, perform keyword research, write SEO-friendly blogs, monitor social media engagements, and track traffic analytics for real brand accounts.
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance, submit all social media design tasks, and assist in setting up a real search/display campaign to get your ₹1,000 fee refunded.
internships.certificateDetails: Digital Marketing Internship Experience Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Keyword research and basic Search Engine Optimization audit
Creating content plans and scheduling posts using automation tools
Interpreting social media engagement metrics and user data
Creating creative graphics and ad copies
Understanding paid search campaign frameworks
internships.eligible: Aspiring marketers, students, entrepreneurs, or graduates who have completed basic digital marketing training.
practicalTasks: Performing comprehensive keyword research for 3 business niches
Creating a 15-day social media post calendar for an educational brand
Writing SEO-friendly headlines and meta descriptions for website pages
Designing social media banners and video thumbnails
careerBenefits: Hands-on portfolio of creative and analytics work
Verified internship experience with a registered institute
Improved chances of securing entry-level SEO and social media jobs

internships.name: Web Development Internship
internships.shortDescription: Collaborate with developers to build and deploy responsive, modern websites.
internships.fullDescription: Test your coding skills on real-world projects. As a Web Development Intern, you will participate in responsive frontend builds, debug site layouts, write clean JavaScript logic, and practice version control and website deployment.
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance, complete your assigned frontend modules, and successfully host your project on Vercel or GitHub Pages to receive a 100% refund of your ₹1,000 fee.
internships.certificateDetails: Frontend Web Developer Internship Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Converting visual mockups (Figma/Images) into semantic HTML/CSS code
Building interactive components with modern JavaScript
Resolving cross-browser alignment issues and responsiveness bugs
Using Git branches, pull requests, and code review workflows
Deploying sites online and optimizing load speeds
internships.eligible: Coding students, college graduates, or self-taught developers familiar with HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript.
practicalTasks: Developing a responsive 3-page landing site using clean CSS/Tailwind
Adding dynamic form validation and interactive search using JavaScript
Refactoring legacy HTML files to improve accessibility and SEO scores
Publishing a portfolio website containing your internship projects
careerBenefits: Actual project code and links to showcase on your CV
Experience with team collaboration workflows in GitHub
Technical experience letter confirming frontend coding competency

internships.name: Tally & Accounting Internship
internships.shortDescription: Manage real bookkeeping accounts, voucher entries, and financial statements.
internships.fullDescription: Gain real-world ledger entries and financial management experience. This internship provides exposure to corporate bookkeeping workflows, purchase/sales cycles, bank reconciliation, and generating profit/loss statements using TallyPrime and Excel.
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance and correctly complete all simulated business transaction journals to receive a 100% refund of your ₹1,000 fee.
internships.certificateDetails: Computerized Accounting Internship Experience Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Handling real-world company transaction logs and books
Creating and managing ledgers, cash books, and bank accounts
Bank Reconciliation Statements (BRS) processes
Inventory tracking and stock adjustment voucher entry
Generating and analyzing trial balance sheets and financial reports
internships.eligible: Commerce students (B.Com/M.Com), accounting aspirants, and individuals who understand accounting principles.
practicalTasks: Recording 50+ diverse business transaction vouchers in TallyPrime
Reconciling a mock bank statement with Tally cash books
Creating a complete inventory register with stock valuation reports
Designing quarterly sales statements using MS Excel charts
careerBenefits: Experience working with TallyPrime - the industry standard software
Practical accounting expertise valued by local businesses
Internship completion certificate to build your financial career

internships.name: GST Internship
internships.shortDescription: Practice computing GST liability, drafting invoices, and filing monthly tax returns.
internships.fullDescription: Immerse yourself in indirect tax compliance. This GST Internship allows you to work with tax data, reconcile purchase register (GSTR-2B) with input credit claims, prepare tax invoices, and draft returns for GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B filings.
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance and successfully complete the monthly return reconciliation project without errors to qualify for a 100% refund of your ₹1,000 fee.
internships.certificateDetails: Tax Compliance (GST) Internship Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Reviewing and verifying business purchase invoices for GST compliance
Input Tax Credit (ITC) verification and mismatch identification
Preparing monthly data sheets for GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B filings
Generating E-Way bills and analyzing tax invoice structures
Tracking latest notifications and circulars on the GST portal
internships.eligible: Commerce graduates, accounting trainees, and junior tax consultants who want practical portal experience.
practicalTasks: Creating a monthly outward supplies datasheet (GSTR-1 layout)
Reconciling internal purchase logs with government GSTR-2B datasets
Calculating net tax liability after claiming eligible Input Tax Credit
Drafting a detailed GST audit checklist for small businesses
careerBenefits: Hands-on expertise in direct tax reconciliation
Direct exposure to Indian tax filing standards
Credibility to start an independent taxation advising practice

internships.name: Income Tax Internship
internships.shortDescription: Help compute taxable income, verify salary certificates, and draft ITR filing forms.
internships.fullDescription: Gain practical tax computation experience. In this internship, you will help analyze individual income sources, verify Form 16 and Form 26AS, calculate tax under old vs new tax regimes, and draft personal income tax returns (ITR-1 and ITR-4).
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance and accurately draft 10 individual ITR returns based on mock cases to receive a 100% refund of your ₹1,000 fee.
internships.certificateDetails: Direct Tax Filing (Income Tax) Internship Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Analyzing Form 16, Form 26AS, and Annual Information Statement (AIS)
Computing taxable income across different Heads of Income
Applying deductions (Section 80C, 80D, 80G, etc.) to minimize tax
Drafting ITR-1 (Sahaj) and ITR-4 (Sugam) forms using offline utilities
Understanding tax deduction at source (TDS) schedules
internships.eligible: Finance students, accountants, and aspiring financial planners seeking practical income tax filing skills.
practicalTasks: Extracting tax data from sample Form 16s and calculating taxable salary
Comparing tax liability under old and new regimes for individual tax cases
Drafting e-filing data sheets for individual and proprietary businesses
Preparing tax computation sheets for freelance professionals
careerBenefits: Valuable experience in direct tax computations
Resume enhancement with specialized tax compliance skills
Internship certificate and performance-based recommendation letter

internships.name: AI Tools Internship
internships.shortDescription: Learn to utilize ChatGPT, Midjourney, and AI workflows to double your productivity.
internships.fullDescription: Master the technology of tomorrow. This 1-month AI Tools Internship teaches you how to leverage generative AI models (for text, code, and images) to automate business operations, create marketing creatives, draft professional content, and build custom automation workflows.
internships.refundDetails: Maintain 90%+ attendance and build a fully operational AI automation workflow or content library to receive your 100% refund of the ₹1,000 fee.
internships.certificateDetails: Generative AI Specialist Internship Experience Certificate from Margdarshak Shikshan Sansthan.
learnItems: Advanced prompt engineering techniques for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini
Generating marketing creatives and visuals with AI tools
Automating repetitive tasks using AI integrations (Zapier, Make)
Analyzing data, summarizing reports, and preparing text using AI models
Understanding AI ethical guidelines and copyright standards
internships.eligible: Tech enthusiasts, students, copywriters, and professionals who want to lead the AI revolution in business workflows.
practicalTasks: Creating a complete prompt catalog for content creation and programming
Developing an automated newsletter workflow using AI assistants
Generating visual assets for a mockup ad campaign using text-to-image models
Drafting a business research report using AI data parsing tools
careerBenefits: Highly in-demand skillset making you 2x faster at tasks
Showcase project portfolio of AI integrations
Official certificate proving competency in modern AI tools

students.name: monira testing
students.notes: Interested in web development course, scheduled demo
